about.title: About Us
about.description: TechNova is a leading provider of AI, cloud, and software solutions for modern businesses.

service.title: AI Development
service.description: We build intelligent AI systems including chatbots, recommendation engines, and predictive analytics.

service.title: Cloud Solutions
service.description: Scalable cloud infrastructure, migration, and DevOps automation services.

service.title: Web Development
service.description: Modern web applications using React, Django, and scalable backend systems.

service.title: Mobile App Development
service.description: Cross-platform mobile apps for Android and iOS with high performance.

post.title: How AI is Transforming Businesses
post.description: Artificial Intelligence is changing how companies operate and make decisions.

post.title: Cloud Migration Best Practices
post.description: Learn the best strategies to migrate your infrastructure to the cloud.

post.title: Top Web Development Trends
post.description: Explore the latest trends in frontend and backend technologies.

post.title: Why Mobile Apps Matter
post.description: Mobile apps are essential for customer engagement and growth.

item.question: What services do you provide?
item.answer: We provide AI, cloud, web, and mobile development services.

item.question: How can I contact you?
item.answer: You can reach us via email or contact form on our website.

item.question: Do you offer custom solutions?
item.answer: Yes, we build fully customized solutions based on business needs.
